item.title: Simple Split Clock for Plasma 6 [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Simple Split Clock for Plasma 6 [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: lamka02sk
item.itunes:summary:
Simple Split Clock for Plasma 6
(Utilities)
Supports Plasma 6.0+
Simple Split Clock widget is a simple plasmoid that displays clock split into 2 lines. Ideal for your vertical panels.
Widget contains only clock, no calendar or settings. It is as simple as it can possibly get. I don't have skill or time to develop more functionality at the moment. Sorry
[read more]
item.description:
Simple Split Clock for Plasma 6
(Utilities)
Supports Plasma 6.0+
Simple Split Clock widget is a simple plasmoid that displays clock split into 2 lines. Ideal for your vertical panels.
Widget contains only clock, no calendar or settings. It is as simple as it can possibly get. I don't have skill or time to develop more functionality at the moment. Sorry
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Simple Split Clock for Plasma 6
(Utilities)
Supports Plasma 6.0+
Simple Split Clock widget is a simple plasmoid that displays clock split into 2 lines. Ideal for your vertical panels.
Widget contains only clock, no calendar or settings. It is as simple as it can possibly get. I don't have skill or time to develop more functionality at the moment. Sorry
[read more]

item.title: ClamAV-GUI [Security]
item.itunes:title: ClamAV-GUI [Security]
item.itunes:author: wusel1007
item.itunes:summary:
ClamAV-GUI
(Security)
A graphical Front-End for the ClamAV Anti-Virus Scanner. It uses freshclam as a backend for signature updates
and provides a scheduler for timed virus scanns.

Please let me know whether the app works to your liking or not. Comments welcome

Repository for OpenSuSE - 15.5 / 15.6 / Tumbleweed:
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.5/home:wusel1007.repo"
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.6/home:wusel1007.repo"
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/openSUSE_Tumbleweed/home:wusel1007.repo"

Use: sudo zypper refresh && sudo zypper install ClamAV-GUI

For Ubuntu (UALinux repository): https://ualinux.com/en/ubuntu-apps-other/clamav-gui
How to add a repository: https://ualinux.com/en/how-to-connect

Added a Spec-File if anybody likes to create a RPM-Package for another Distro that uses RPM-Packages
[read more]
item.description:
ClamAV-GUI
(Security)
A graphical Front-End for the ClamAV Anti-Virus Scanner. It uses freshclam as a backend for signature updates
and provides a scheduler for timed virus scanns.

Please let me know whether the app works to your liking or not. Comments welcome

Use: sudo zypper refresh && sudo zypper install ClamAV-GUI

For Ubuntu (UALinux repository): https://ualinux.com/en/ubuntu-apps-other/clamav-gui
How to add a repository: https://ualinux.com/en/how-to-connect

Added a Spec-File if anybody likes to create a RPM-Package for another Distro that uses RPM-Packages
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
ClamAV-GUI
(Security)
A graphical Front-End for the ClamAV Anti-Virus Scanner. It uses freshclam as a backend for signature updates
and provides a scheduler for timed virus scanns.

Please let me know whether the app works to your liking or not. Comments welcome

Repository for OpenSuSE - 15.5 / 15.6 / Tumbleweed:
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.5/home:wusel1007.repo"
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.6/home:wusel1007.repo"
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/openSUSE_Tumbleweed/home:wusel1007.repo"

Use: sudo zypper refresh && sudo zypper install ClamAV-GUI

For Ubuntu (UALinux repository): https://ualinux.com/en/ubuntu-apps-other/clamav-gui
How to add a repository: https://ualinux.com/en/how-to-connect

Added a Spec-File if anybody likes to create a RPM-Package for another Distro that uses RPM-Packages
[read more]

item.title: Camera Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Camera Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: usbdatarecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Camera Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Website www.datarecoverybook.com is helpful for common users to download technically advance file rescue software for camera that restores lost images even if memory card is pulled from working camera. Well designed Camera Data Recovery application empowers general users to undelete missing data from commonly used digital cameras.
[read more]
item.description:
Camera Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Website www.datarecoverybook.com is helpful for common users to download technically advance file rescue software for camera that restores lost images even if memory card is pulled from working camera. Well designed Camera Data Recovery application empowers general users to undelete missing data from commonly used digital cameras.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Camera Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Website www.datarecoverybook.com is helpful for common users to download technically advance file rescue software for camera that restores lost images even if memory card is pulled from working camera. Well designed Camera Data Recovery application empowers general users to undelete missing data from commonly used digital cameras.
[read more]

item.title: Professional Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Professional Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: usbdatarecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Professional Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Professional data recovery program used to recover mp3, mp4, video, digital picture, personal documents, text, folder from storage media. Data recovery utility provides recovery of folder erased and missing file that lost due to power failure, and unexpected disk formatted damaged partition, fluctuation, natural disaster, software, and hardware problem. Revive tool has great friendly user interface with no technical training needed to operate.
[read more]
item.description:
Professional Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Professional data recovery program used to recover mp3, mp4, video, digital picture, personal documents, text, folder from storage media. Data recovery utility provides recovery of folder erased and missing file that lost due to power failure, and unexpected disk formatted damaged partition, fluctuation, natural disaster, software, and hardware problem. Revive tool has great friendly user interface with no technical training needed to operate.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Professional Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Professional data recovery program used to recover mp3, mp4, video, digital picture, personal documents, text, folder from storage media. Data recovery utility provides recovery of folder erased and missing file that lost due to power failure, and unexpected disk formatted damaged partition, fluctuation, natural disaster, software, and hardware problem. Revive tool has great friendly user interface with no technical training needed to operate.
[read more]
